title: Regional Famine
description: A drought across the region has left neighboring communities without enough food, and pressure is mounting for your nation to respond.

title: Currency Crisis
description: Markets are panicking over the value of your currency, and investors are pulling their money out fast.

options.label: Take an emergency loan from allies

title: Border Skirmish
description: Tensions have flared into open fighting along a contested border. Both sides are calling on you to act.

options.label: Respond with a show of force

title: Pandemic Outbreak
description: A fast-moving illness is spreading through crowded cities, and hospitals are warning they'll be overwhelmed within weeks.

title: Major Earthquake
description: A powerful earthquake has leveled buildings across a populated region, and the death toll is still climbing.

title: Refugee Crisis
description: Conflict beyond your borders has sent thousands fleeing toward your territory seeking safety.

options.label: Turn refugees away at the border

title: Cyberattack on Infrastructure
description: Hackers have crippled key utilities, knocking out power and water systems in several cities.

options.label: Patch what you can and hope

title: Trade Embargo
description: A major trading partner has abruptly cut off trade over a political dispute, threatening key industries at home.

options.label: Retaliate with tariffs of your own

title: Stock Market Crash
description: Markets have plunged overnight, wiping out savings and threatening the jobs of thousands of workers.

title: Corruption Scandal
description: Investigators have uncovered evidence of bribery reaching deep into your administration.

options.label: Handle it with a quiet reshuffle

title: Historic Drought
description: An unprecedented dry spell is withering farmland across the country, threatening the food supply.

title: An Ally Requests Support
description: A close ally is asking for military and financial backing in a regional conflict, and other nations are watching how you respond.
